channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. World Cup soccer roster to be announced today
item.description: Veterans like Christian Pulisic, Weston McKennie, and Tyler Adams are expected to make the final cut for the World Cup squad.

item.title: Why the French Open is named after Roland Garros, a non-tennis player
item.description: Roland Garros, a WWI pilot who revolutionized aerial combat, had the Paris tennis tournament named after him in 1928.

item.title: Gulf shrimpers seek congressional aid amid rising fuel costs
item.description: The remaining Gulf shrimpers face challenges from higher gas prices and competition with cheaper imports.

item.title: South Carolina Legislature rejects Trump-backed redistricting plan
item.description: Republican state senators, not facing election this year, declined Trump's request to redraw districts to unseat a prominent Democrat in the House.
